name: LMNT
description: LMNT — Ultra-low-latency speech synthesis API for real-time voice agents and interactive voice applications.

seo.title: LMNT — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: LMNT: LMNT — Ultra-low-latency speech synthesis API for real-time voice agents and interactive voice applications.

when_to_use: Cloning and synthesizing voices for real-time voice AI products
Generating low-latency TTS for conversational voice agents
Producing narration audio for interactive media and games
Deploying voice synthesis at scale for podcast automation

pros: Consistently low latency for voice agents
Streaming API suited to real-time interactions
Good voice quality at competitive price
cons: Expressivity less varied vs top rivals
review.verdict: A strong pick when sub-second latency matters more than broadest voice catalog.
review.best_for: Voice agents, IVR replacements and real-time conversational apps
review.not_for: Audiobook, dubbing or localization needing huge voice libraries

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
